title: Gap five-area coverage matrix and disposition input

review_policy.note: Per user instruction, full Claude review execution is skipped going forward and must not be counted as a valid review receipt.

notes: All five areas are partial, not covered, because CP closeout has no remaining planned packs and the relevant rows still require overlay, runtime, UI/API, storage, HR-sensitive, or owner disposition work.
T01 only creates the matrix and disposition input list. It does not decide T02 disposition.
Full Claude review is waived by user instruction and is not counted as valid review evidence.

tuw_evidence.title: Decide disposition for uncovered/partial rows
tuw_evidence.blocked_reason: LT-PRE-W04-T02 requires a disposition decision for each partial row: overlay_admission_referral or deferred_explicit. Codex has prepared the input list but cannot synthesize owner-approved disposition.

next_required_action.decision_needed: For each of R5, R6, R8, R10, and R14 choose overlay_admission_referral or deferred_explicit, with decision date and basis.
evidence_to_add_after_decision: Updated LT-PRE-W04-T02 command evidence with five owner-approved disposition rows

blocked_claims: This record does not claim LT-PRE-W04 is terminally closed.
This record does not claim any partial row is admitted into scope.
This record does not claim any partial row is explicitly deferred.
This record does not modify or reinterpret closed CP evidence.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.
